scripts.dev:remote: bun run wrangler:config && wrangler dev --config wrangler.generated.json --remote
scripts.dev:local: bun run wrangler:config && wrangler dev --config wrangler.generated.json --local --persist-to ../../.wrangler/state
scripts.deploy: bun run wrangler:config && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.generated.json
